sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Zeisu kei taang ding si hi

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Zeisu si hi kei taang ding

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Lam a khial tuu te zong hi
A khut tawh keimah hong pom hi
Lampi ah hong kha kik hi

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Mittaw in a launa tam a
Ahih hang hong gum ding hi

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Khuamial kei tungah hong tung ta
Kei hong ompih in Topa aw
Hong kem in lam hong hilh ta

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Topa in hong cing ding hi
